title: Checklist evidence remains active
recommendation: Carry forward from iteration 003 until checklist evidence and playbook-count drift are repaired.

title: skill_graph_scan source default still points at the deleted singular skills root
recommendation: Carry forward from iteration 003 until source, dist, and schema defaults agree on .opencode/skills.

title: scripts/dist still contains stale singular .opencode/skill references
recommendation: Carry forward from iteration 003 until generated scripts/dist references are rebuilt or intentionally patched.

title: Packet 095 reports impossible execution results and cites missing cross-runtime transcripts
recommendation: Carry forward from iteration 003 until CR-016/017/018 execution state and transcript evidence are reconciled.

title: The new 093 playbooks are not reachable from their owning skill files
recommendation: Carry forward from iteration 003 until the playbook roots are linked from owning SKILL.md files.

title: spec_folder is interpolated into executable workflow commands before containment is enforced
claim: A malicious or malformed spec_folder can escape the intended review packet boundary and can be embedded into executable workflow commands before the claimed authority guard runs.
counterevidenceSought: Workflow runner validation that rejects or quotes spec_folder before every command render
A shared resolver containment check not visible in the reviewed files
Tests proving absolute paths, ../ traversal, quotes, and shell metacharacters are rejected before executable steps run
alternativeExplanation: The YAML preflight may be intended as the enforcement point, but the reviewed executable commands still interpolate the raw placeholder and the resolver/reducer accept absolute and parent-traversal inputs directly.
downgradeTrigger: Add executable containment tests, pass sanitized argv/env values instead of raw interpolation, and prove reducer writes cannot leave the workflow-approved spec folder.
recommendation: Centralize spec-folder validation against repo-local specs roots and require all workflow command/writer paths to consume the sanitized result only.

title: Resolver containment remains insufficient as a standalone helper
recommendation: Resolve through P1-019 by making the resolver reject absolute paths, parent traversal, unresolved placeholders, and paths outside approved specs roots.

title: Prior P2 carried from earlier review state
recommendation: Retain until the prior registry entry is resolved or downgraded by a targeted pass.

title: Copilot target-authority guard is still non-functional in the imported module
recommendation: Implement and export buildCopilotPromptArg/validateSpecFolder in source and dist, or remove the Copilot branch's authority-guard claims until the helper exists and is tested.

title: Singular schema/default text remains beyond code-graph policy
recommendation: Carry forward from iteration 003 until singular root text in source schemas and generated dist references is resolved.
